home.overview.desc1b.message: an integrated operations system for IIC overseas subsidiaries, supporting

home.overview.desc1c.message: sales, inventory, store operations, and Rx management

home.overview.desc2.message: It enables HQ-level visibility into store and online sales, and supports inventory monitoring, inbound/outbound processing, and history management for offline stores.

home.overview.desc3.message: It also provides warranty card printing, membership management, and Rx management — allowing lab technicians at each subsidiary to view prescription details and manage all online/offline lens work orders.

home.server.note1.message: Please contact the Operation channel for account creation.

home.server.note2.message: We recommend changing the initial password of your issued account.

home.server.note3.message: For permission changes on your account, please contact the administrator.
